name: @radzor/video-transcode
description: Transcode video files between formats using FFmpeg subprocess. Supports format conversion, resolution scaling, codec selection, thumbnail extraction, and progress reporting.

inputs.name: ffprobePath
inputs.description: Path to the ffprobe binary for metadata extraction.

inputs.name: outputDir
inputs.description: Default output directory for transcoded files.

fields.name: outputPath
fields.description: Path to the transcoded output file.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration of the output file in seconds.

fields.name: format
fields.description: Container format of the output (e.g. mp4, webm).

events.name: onTranscodeComplete
events.description: Fired when a transcode operation completes successfully.

events.name: onTranscodeFailed
events.description: Fired when a transcode operation fails.

events.name: onProgress
events.description: Fired periodically during transcoding with progress information.

actions.name: transcode

params.name: inputPath
params.description: Path to the input video file.

actions.description: Transcode a video file with the specified options.

actions.name: getProgress
actions.description: Get the current progress of a running transcode job.

actions.name: extractThumbnail

params.name: outputPath
params.description: Path for the output thumbnail image.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Time position in seconds for the thumbnail.

actions.description: Extract a thumbnail image from a video file.

actions.name: getMetadata
actions.description: Get metadata (duration, resolution, codec, etc.) from a video file.

llm.constraints: Requires FFmpeg and FFprobe binaries installed on the system. Server-only (uses child_process). Transcode jobs are in-memory; progress is lost on process restart. Large files may take significant time and disk space.
